Hero.subtitle: Sistama AI kan gargaaru dhimmoota badanii dafanii argachuuf gargaaru.

About.title: Kompanii Keenya
About.aimLong: Kayyoon keenya dhimmoota badanii fi hataman maatii fi abbaa waliin walqunnamsiisuu dha.
About.visionShort: Biyya lafaa wanti tokko iyyuu baduu itti hin dandeenye uumuu
About.visionLong: Creating a world where nothing is ever truly lost, and every community is connected to safeguard their members and belongings.
About.strategyShort: Teknoolojii fi hawaasa gargaaramuun dafanii argachuu
About.strategyLong: Leveraging state-of-the-art AI detection, secure cloud infrastructure, and instant notification bots for seamless public-private safety networks.

Features.title: Dandeettiiwwan Pilaatfoormii
Features.subtitle: Sistamni keenya teknoolojii ammayyaa fi hirmaannaa hawaasaa irratti hundaa'a.
Features.faceDesc: Advanced facial recognition algorithms to quickly identify and match missing persons from community uploads.
Features.carDesc: Automated license plate and vehicle model detection to locate stolen or missing cars efficiently.
Features.gpsDesc: Real-time location tracking for registered smart belts, ensuring constant safety monitoring.
Features.bellDesc: Instant alerts sent to nearby community members and authorities when a new case is reported.
Features.usersDesc: A collaborative platform where users can report sightings to help resolve active cases faster.
Features.shieldDesc: Automated verification and prioritized routing of emergency SOS signals for immediate response.

HowItWorks.title: Akkamitti Hojjata
HowItWorks.subtitle: Tarkaanfiiwwan salphaa badanii fi hataman argachuuf gargaaran.
HowItWorks.processSubtitle: Four simple steps to find what you've lost or report what you've found
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Odeeffannoo fi suuraa nama ykn konkolaataa badee galchi.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Sistamni keenya AI odeeffannoo fi suuraa ni xiinxala.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Akeekkachiisni gara hawaasa naannoo dhiyoo jirutti ni ergama.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Bakki dhumaa fi sochii meeshaa kaartaa irratti ni mul'ata.
HowItWorks.reportSubtitle: Three types of cases you can register in our system
HowItWorks.missingPersonDesc: Report a missing family member or individual. Include photos, description, and last seen location.
HowItWorks.missingVehicleDesc: Report stolen or missing vehicles. Include license plate, model, and identifying features.
HowItWorks.specialCasesDesc: Report mentally ill persons or criminal background cases. Requires official documentation.
HowItWorks.pricingSubtitle: First registration is FREE. After that, choose a plan that works for you.

faqList.q: How many free registrations do I get?
faqList.a: You get 1 free registration total (for either a person or vehicle). After that, you'll need to subscribe to a premium plan to continue reporting missing cases.
Our camera system automatically detects missing persons/vehicles. When a match is found, you'll receive an alert in your dashboard. The alert stays active until you view and acknowledge it.

faqList.q: What documents are needed for special cases?
faqList.a: For mentally ill persons: valid doctor's report. For criminal background cases: official arrest warrant or court order. These are verified by our admin team.

faqList.q: How long do alerts stay active?
faqList.a: Alerts remain active until you view them. The system operates 24/7, so you can receive alerts at any time.
We accept Bank Transfer, Wallet payments, and Credit/Debit cards. All payments are secure and encrypted.

faqList.q: Will I get notifications via Telegram?
faqList.a: Yes! You can connect your Telegram account for instant notifications when your case is detected.

faqList.q: Can police officers have special access?
faqList.a: Yes, law enforcement officers can have priority access to certain cases. Contact our admin for verification.

faqList.q: Is the platform available in Amharic?
faqList.a: Yes, the platform now fully supports both English and Amharic!

HowItWorks.testimonialSubtitle: Hear from families and individuals who have successfully recovered their loved ones and vehicles

testimonialsList.name: Sara Johnson
testimonialsList.content: I found my car within 24 hours of posting here. The AI detection is incredible!

testimonialsList.name: Kebede M.

testimonialsList.name: Tigist Haile
testimonialsList.content: My car was stolen and within 3 days, Flega's system spotted it. The police were notified and I got my car back.

Testimonials.quote2: The alert system is so fast. Thank you for helping me find my brother.

AboutUs.title: About
AboutUs.subtitle: Subheading for description or instructions
AboutUs.bodyText: Flega is an local and international safety platform designed in Ethiopia to help locate lost items, missing persons, and stolen vehicles using AI detection and real-time community alerts.

Settings.title: Sajataa Herregaa
Settings.description: Configure your display details, privacy levels, and background active CCTV notification settings.
Settings.verifiedSyncDesc: Your preferences and credentials are encrypted during transmission and securely stored in Flega's central MongoDB database. Unsaved changes are monitored locally in real-time to prevent accidental navigation loss.
Settings.profileInfoSubtitle: Update your personal details and profile picture
Settings.securitySubtitle: Manage your password and account security
Settings.securityTip: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters, including numbers and special characters.
Settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
Settings.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible and all your data, including reports and settings, will be permanently removed.
Settings.smsAlertsDesc: Get text messages for urgent updates
Settings.allowDataCollectionDesc: Help us improve by sharing anonymous usage data
